---
title: "ENVS-193DS_spring-2026_final"
author: Tadeh Peroomian
date: 08-06-2026
format: 
  pdf:
    toc: true
editor: source    
---

![Link to my Repository](https://github.com/tadehperoomian/ENVS-193DS_spring-2026_final)


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
library(readxl)
library(here)


nest <- read.csv("data/nest_data_final.csv")
```
